emails.subject: Re: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: Re: Asset Financing Structured Finance Presentation How about commercial folks? From: Roseann Engeldorf/ENRON@enronXgate on 05/02/2001 02:20 PM

emails.subject: RE: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: I can give up my seat and sit in with the commercial team, if that helps. ckm

emails.subject: RE: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: I can give up my seat and sit in with the commercial team, if that helps. ckm

emails.subject: RE: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: I can give up my seat and sit in with the commercial team, if that helps. ckm

emails.subject: RE: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: I'd still like to sit in when my commercial team hears it, if possible. Plus, I suspect we run the risk this week of getting very bogged down. ckm

emails.subject: RE: Asset Financing - Structured Finance Presentation
emails.body: OK. However, much of the EECC team will be there next time, too, as there is no room for everyone this week. Also, I will need input from you as to which "commercial" people need to be there for the next one. Thanks, Rose
